metadata.description: And/or Labs - AI x GTM tools for B2B SaaS analysis

plugins.name: gtm-grader
plugins.description: Scores SaaS websites against 77 research-backed checks across 13 categories: 47 optimization rules from peer-reviewed marketing science, 9 positioning checks from Dunford and Fletch PMM, and 21 search discoverability checks (technical SEO, E-E-A-T, content depth) with competitive landscape analysis and content pillar recommendations. Commands: grade, position, search, wins, export.
